headline: NetApp Hosts Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results Webcast
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., May 06, 2026--After market close on May 28, 2026, NetApp (NASDAQ: NTAP) will announce financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2026, which ended April 24, 2026.
